groups.label: Famous Georges
groups.explanation: George Washington, George Marshall, George Patton, and George Orwell all share the first name George.

groups.label: Famous Johns
groups.explanation: John Adams, John F. Kennedy, John Quincy Adams, and John Brown all share the first name John.

groups.label: Famous Elizabeths
groups.explanation: The 'Tudor Queen' (Elizabeth I), Elizabeth Cady Stanton, Elizabeth Blackwell, and the 'Windsor Queen' (Elizabeth II) all share the first name Elizabeth.

groups.label: Famous Alexanders
groups.explanation: Alexander the Great, Alexander Hamilton, Alexander Graham Bell, and Alexander II of Russia all share the first name Alexander.
